name: Stir-Fried Spicy Lobster
recipeIngredient: 2 red peppers, seeds, membranes removed, diced small
2 yellow peppers, seeds, membranes removed, diced
8 ounces oyster mushrooms, cleaned and sliced
8 ounces shiitake mushrooms, cleaned and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring soy sauce to a boil, add butter in chunks, stirring until all is incorporated. Set aside.
2. Cook angel hair pasta in boiling salted water until "al dente."
3. Combine sesame oil with hot pepper oil (approximately 1 ounce total per portion based on the desired heat).
4. Stir-fry lobsters in oils after coming up to smoke stage. Add scallions, peppers, and mushrooms. Cook until "al dente."
5. Add angel hair pasta and soy butter to mixture, toss everything together.
6. Place on center of each plate. Arrange hot lobster shells on plates to appear as a whole lobster presentation.
